title: Most news apps are designed to keep you scrolling, not to keep you informed.
body:
We noticed a problem in how we consume information. We spend hours reading headlines and quick summaries, but we often finish feeling like we know less about the actual context of a story than when we started. The volume of noise is high, but the signal is low.

That is why we built Deep Dive Mode for Headlinne. It is not just about getting another summary. It is designed to pull back the curtain on a story. When you toggle it on, the app connects the dots between today's news and the history that led up to it. It explains the 'why' behind the headlines so you can form your own perspective instead of just absorbing someone else's.

We believe technology should do more than just feed us content. It should help us think more clearly. True understanding comes from context, not just speed.
cta: If you are tired of shallow news feeds, see how we are changing the experience at HEADLINNE.com.
